info.title: Outlets Service
info.description: Manages press outlets (publications) and their campaign relevance data. Routes are organized under /org (requires x-api-key + x-org-id) and /internal (requires x-api-key only).

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: API key for authenticating requests. Required on all routes except /health and /openapi.json.

post.description: Upserts by outlet_domain — if the domain already exists, updates the name/url. Callers should provide campaign/brand/feature/workflow headers for proper context.

example.whyRelevant: Top tech publication with high domain authority
example.whyNotRelevant: Highly competitive, may not accept guest posts

get.description: Returns outlets deduplicated by outlet_id with nested campaign data. Always scoped by x-org-id. At least one of brandId or campaignId is required (org-only scoping returns 400). Status is a structured object from journalists-service with cumulative journalist counts.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by internal DB status. Use this to filter outlets by their discovery pipeline state.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max distinct outlets per page. Omit to return all outlets.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset (only used when limit is provided)

200.description: List of deduplicated outlets with nested campaigns. Requires at least brandId or campaignId.

relevanceScore.description: Max relevance score across all campaigns for this outlet.

status.description: Hybrid status object. Always includes outletStatus/statusReason/statusDetail from outlets-service DB. When journalist data exists, also includes totalJournalists, brand, byCampaign, campaign, and global from journalists-service.

outletStatus.description: DB status from outlets-service (first/most recent campaign)

statusReason.description: Short reason for the outlet's status

statusDetail.description: Detailed debug info for the status

totalJournalists.description: Total journalists for this outlet (from journalists-service)

brand.description: Cumulative counts at brand scope. Null in campaign mode.

byCampaign.description: Per-campaign counts. Present in brand mode, null in campaign mode.

campaign.description: Cumulative counts at campaign scope. Null in brand mode.

campaigns.description: Campaign-level data for this outlet. Status breakdown is in status.byCampaign.

statusReason.description: Short reason for the outlet's status in this campaign

statusDetail.description: Detailed debug info for the status

total.description: Total distinct outlets matching filters (not truncated by pagination)

byOutreachStatus.description: Cumulative journalist status counts across ALL outlets matching filters. Passed through from journalists-service.

campaigns.whyRelevant: Top tech publication with high domain authority

400.description: Missing required filter — at least one of brandId or campaignId query parameter is required

example.error: At least one of brandId or campaignId query parameter is required

patch.description: Updates the status of an outlet within a campaign. Requires x-campaign-id to identify the campaign_outlet row.

example.statusDetail: Already contacted for this brand in another campaign

statusDetail.description: Detailed debug info about why this status was set

post.description: Callers should provide campaign/brand/feature/workflow headers. Max 500 outlets per request.
Full-text search (ILIKE) on outlet name and URL, scoped by org.

get.description: Returns outlet discovery stats: total outlets discovered, average relevance score, search queries used, and a `byOutreachStatus` breakdown with cumulative journalist counts from journalists-service. Supports filtering by brand, campaign, workflow, feature, and groupBy for dimensional breakdown.

200.description: Stats (flat when no groupBy, grouped when groupBy is set). Flat response includes `byOutreachStatus` — cumulative journalist status counts from journalists-service.

get.description: Returns aggregated discovery costs via runs-service.

post.description: Runs outlet discovery: generates categories, searches Google, scores results, inserts into buffer.
Returns up to `count` highest-scored open outlets. Auto-discovers if buffer is empty.

post.summary: Lookup outlets by IDs and/or campaignId
post.description: Internal endpoint — requires only x-api-key, no org context. At least one of `ids` or `campaignId` must be provided. When `campaignId` is provided, returns enriched campaign-outlet data including structured `status` from journalists-service. Without `campaignId`, returns basic outlet data only.

Re-assigns all solo-brand rows (where brand_ids contains exactly one element matching sourceBrandId) from sourceOrgId to targetOrgId. When targetBrandId is provided, also rewrites the brand reference. Skips co-branding rows. Idempotent — running twice is a no-op.
